message.content:
1. Agentic micropayments enable autonomous agents to transact seamlessly in real time without human intervention.  
2. They reduce transaction friction by supporting extremely small-value payments that are economically viable due to low overhead.  
3. Agentic micropayments enhance digital service monetization by allowing pay-per-use or pay-per-interaction models.  
4. They improve user privacy and security through decentralized, permissionless payment rails like blockchain.  
5. These micropayments foster innovation in AI-driven economies by facilitating machine-to-machine commerce at scale.
